meta.project: Trợ Lý Thần Nông (Agricultural AI Assistant)

product_overview: Trợ Lý Thần Nông is a web-based AI assistant for farmers in Lâm Đồng that helps with agricultural knowledge consultation and crop decision support. It also provides an admin dashboard for viewing usage statistics and uploading new knowledge documents.
core_goals: Ask agricultural questions and receive technical guidance from the AI assistant
Enter crop, region, capital, and area details to get cultivation risk and price forecasting insights
Log in as an administrator to view analytics and manage the knowledge base through PDF ingestion

features.name: Tư vấn tri thức nông nghiệp (RAG Chat)
features.description: Allows users to ask cultivation and technical farming questions and receive AI-generated answers grounded in the agricultural knowledge base.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Open the AI assistant chat -> Enter an agricultural question -> Send the question -> See the answer in the chat thread
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the AI assistant chat -> Ask about a farming technique for a specific crop -> Submit the message -> Read the grounded agricultural guidance

features.name: Phân tích dự báo canh tác
features.description: Lets users provide cultivation inputs such as region, crop type, capital, and area to receive AI-based risk analysis and price forecasting insights.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Select a growing region -> Select a crop type -> Adjust the capital amount -> Enter the cultivation area -> Submit the analysis request -> See the risk and forecast results
Navigate to /index.html -> Select a growing region -> Select a crop type -> Adjust the capital amount -> Enter the cultivation area -> Review the generated ROI and ecological risk insights

features.name: Dashboard Quản trị
features.description: Provides administrators with crop and region statistics and supports uploading PDF knowledge documents for ingestion into the knowledge base.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin.html -> Log in with administrator credentials -> View the crop composition chart and regional activity chart
Navigate to /admin.html -> Log in with administrator credentials -> Upload a PDF knowledge document -> Trigger knowledge refresh -> See the updated ingestion action complete

routes.description: Trang chủ chứa form dự báo và chat AI

Xem biểu đồ hoạt động theo vùng
